channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The latest DJI Osmo Action 6 image leak gives us our first look at the camera actually in action
item.description: Another picture of the DJI Osmo Action 6 has emerged, and it's likely that more leaks are going to follow.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Teen sues AI tool maker over fake nude images
item.description: A New Jersey teenager filed a major lawsuit against AI/Robotics Venture Strategy 3 Ltd. over ClothOff, an AI tool that created fake nude images from her social media photos.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch Mayor of Kingstown season 4 online from anywhere – stream Taylor Sheridan crime drama
item.description: Jeremy Renner stars as the "Mayor" looking to stop all out gang war as the hit show returns. Here's how to watch Mayor of Kingstown season 4 online no matter where in the world you are.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wardley, TechRadar

item.title: Trump rips Canada's 'crooked' anti-tariffs ad as possibly AI
item.description: President Trump took another swing at Canada late Friday, calling a controversial anti-tariff ad featuring excerpts from a former President Reagan speech, "crooked" and "dishonest." He also suggested that the video was "possibly" generated by artificial intelligence (AI).
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mancini, The Hill

item.title: Scammers try to trick LastPass users into giving up credentials by telling them they’re dead
item.description: Are you sure you’re still alive? If so, you may fall for a phishing scam aimed at getting the master login passwords of LastPass password manager users. OK, this sounds weird, but in some ways it isn’t.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: About 4 in 10 worried about environmental impacts of AI: Survey
item.description: A new poll shows growing concerns among citizens over the potential environmental effects caused by artificial intelligence. The Associated Press-NORC Center poll, released Thursday, found about 4 in 10 U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Sanders: Government should break up OpenAI
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) said he believes the government should break up OpenAI, underscoring his concerns about AI's potential impact on the job market and interpersonal relationships.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Conservative activist reaches 'breaking point' with Google
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter delivers the latest developments form the world of artificial intelligence, including the technology's challenges and opportunities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The hot issues for CIOs at TechCrunch Disrupt 2025
item.description: The TechCrunch Disrupt conference has long provided valuable insights to and about startups and their investors — but CIOs can learn by talking with startups too, and there’s plenty to learn about at this year’s event.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Google TPUs find sweet spot of AI demand, a decade after chip’s debut
item.description: In an AI chip industry that's almost entirely commanded by Nvidia Corp., a Google chip first developed more than 10 years ago especially for artificial intelligence tasks is finally gaining momentum outside its home company as a way to train and run complex AI models.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Applied Materials to cut more than 1,400 jobs after sales slow
item.description: Earlier this month, Applied Materials said an expansion of US export curbs to China would cost the company $600 million in lost revenue in fiscal 2026.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: In a California farming region, researchers are mapping rural heat to protect farmworkers
item.description: In the summers, the sky is jet black when Raul Cruz arrives at this Imperial Valley sugarcane field to start his day. He chops, cleans and bundles the crop, taking heed as the sun rises. It's hard work, but so is starting at 4 a.m.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA and JAE C. HONG, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Microsoft debuts Mico, Copilot’s AI alternative to Clippy
item.description: Clippy, the animated paper clip that annoyed Microsoft Office users nearly three decades ago, might have just been ahead of its time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Rivian mobility spinoff readies $4,500 e-bike as first product
item.description: Also, the micromobility startup spun out of Rivian Automotive Inc., has unveiled its first consumer product: an electric bike that will cost up to $4,500.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Hidden debug code returns from the dead as TP-Link routers face a wave of new critical root access flaws
item.description: TP-Link vulnerabilities reveal recurring coding issues and incomplete patches which could gift attackers full control of affected routers.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Musk's rollercoaster year: From boycotts and plunging earnings to a potential trillion-dollar payday
item.description: Elon Musk literally left a government job with a black eye, has seen profits at his car company sink and must worry about federal regulators disrupting his plans to unleash a fleet of driverless taxis on America's roads in the next few years.
item.dc:creator: Bernard Condon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump's surgeon general pick set for virtual confirmation hearing
item.description: The Senate Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions (HELP) will hold a virtual confirmation hearing over the nomination of Casey Means to be U.S. surgeon general next week, five months after she was nominated.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, The Hill

item.title: Google’s Quantum chip claims 13,000x speed advantage over supercomputers
item.description: Google Quantum AI has demonstrated what it describes as a verifiable quantum advantage — running a new algorithm on quantum hardware that outperforms classical supercomputers by a factor of 13,000.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: American e-waste is causing a 'hidden tsunami' in Southeast Asia, report says
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Millions of tons of discarded electronics from the United States are being shipped overseas, much of it to developing countries in Southeast Asia unprepared to safely handle hazardous waste, according to a new report released Wednesday by an environmental watchdog.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: PyTorch team unveils framework for programming clusters
item.description: The PyTorch team at Meta, stewards of the PyTorch open source machine learning framework, has unveiled Monarch, a distributed programming framework intended to bring the simplicity of PyTorch to entire clusters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: This is the world’s first vertical take-off AI-piloted fighter jet
item.description: San Diego-based Shield AI is developing a first of its kind fighter jet: a 2,000-mile-range pilotless plane that takes off and lands vertically and uses artificial intelligence to fly itself, even when adversaries jam navigation and communication systems.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: Reddit sues AI company Perplexity and others for 'industrial-scale' scraping of user comments
item.description: Social media platform Reddit sued the artificial intelligence company Perplexity AI and three other entities on Wednesday, alleging their involvement in an “industrial-scale, unlawful” economy to “scrape” the comments of millions of Reddit users for commercial gain.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kevin O’Leary says ‘Marty Supreme’ blew millions by not using AI actors
item.description: The “Shark Tank” star said the production costs are outdated when AI can create realistic looking background characters.
item.dc:creator: Teddy Grant, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI launches Atlas browser to compete with Google Chrome
item.description: OpenAI introduced its own web browser, Atlas, on Tuesday, putting the ChatGPT maker in direct competition with Google as more internet users rely on artificial intelligence to answer their questions.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Google and Apple face extra UK scrutiny over 'strategic' role in mobile platforms
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain’s antitrust watchdog on Wednesday targeted Google and Apple for their “strategic” roles in mobile ecosystems, opening the door for regulators to impose changes to their business practices to improve competition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Netflix blames tax dispute in Brazil for rare quarterly earnings letdown
item.description: Netflix missed the earnings target set by stock market analysts during the video streamer’s latest quarter, a letdown that the company blamed on a tax dispute in Brazil. The results announced Tuesday broke Netflix's six-quarter streak of posting a profit that eclipsed analysts' projections.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Big Tech is paying millions to train teachers on AI, in a push to bring chatbots into classrooms
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — On a scorching hot Saturday in San Antonio, dozens of teachers traded a day off for a glimpse of the future. The topic of the day’s workshop: enhancing instruction with artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon cloud outage resolved after downing dozens of major websites, apps
item.description: Amazon Web Services provides infrastructure for many big-name companies, as well as state and local governments.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: China accuses US of cyberattack on national time center
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China on Sunday accused the U.S. National Security Agency of carrying out cyberattacks on its national time center following an investigation, saying any damage to related facilities could have disrupted network communications, financial systems and power supply.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
